# ⚙️ Infrastructure (436)

The unglamorous layer that decides whether your AI ships or stalls. Serve models fast, store embeddings, route traffic, watch costs, and keep the whole stack observable in production.

[↑ Back to index](../README.md)

## Inference Server

Serve models with blazing throughput and low latency under real traffic

## Vector DB

Store and search billions of embeddings in milliseconds for RAG and semantic search

<details>
<summary>Show 20 repos</summary>

It offers features like authentication, real-time subscriptions, and vector database capabilities for AI.
- [milvus-io/milvus](https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus) — ⭐ 44,803 · `Go` · Self-hosted Service — Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database designed for scalable Approximate Nearest Neighbor (ANN) search. It enables AI applications to power large-scale vector similarity search, especially useful for RAG and embedding stores.
- [facebookresearch/faiss](https://github.com/facebookresearch/faiss) — ⭐ 40,043 · `C++` · Library — Faiss is an efficient C++ library by Meta, with Python interfaces, for similarity search and clustering of dense vectors. It is designed for large-scale vector processing scenarios, often used in applications like RAG systems and recommendation engines.
- [surrealdb/surrealdb](https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb) — ⭐ 32,206 · `Rust` · Self-hosted Service — SurrealDB is a scalable, distributed, and collaborative document-graph database designed for real-time web applications. It integrates document, graph, relational, and vector search capabilities into a single database system with a unified query language.
- [chroma-core/chroma](https://github.com/chroma-core/chroma) — ⭐ 27,810 · `Rust` · Self-hosted Service — Chroma provides search infrastructure specifically designed for AI applications, functioning as a vector database. - [lancedb/lancedb](https://github.com/lancedb/lancedb) — ⭐ 10,876 · `HTML` · Library — LanceDB is an open-source embedded retrieval library designed for multimodal AI applications. It functions as a developer-friendly vector database, providing efficient approximate nearest neighbor search and semantic search capabilities.
- [alibaba/zvec](https://github.com/alibaba/zvec) — ⭐ 9,798 · `C++` · Library — Zvec is a lightweight, lightning-fast, in-process vector database designed for efficient semantic search, similarity search, and RAG applications, often used for LLM memory.
- [lance-format/lance](https://github.com/lance-format/lance) — ⭐ 6,456 · `Rust` · Library — Lance is an open-source lakehouse data format designed for multimodal AI, offering 100x faster random access, vector indexing, and data versioning compared to Parquet. It supports mixed search (vector, full-text, SQL) and integrates with popular data tools like Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, and PyTorch.
- [HelixDB/helix-db](https://github.com/HelixDB/helix-db) — ⭐ 4,115 · `Rust` · Self-hosted Service — HelixDB is an open-source database written in Rust, uniquely combining graph and vector database functionalities. It is specifically designed to support AI applications, especially for Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) tasks.
- [ruvnet/RuVector](https://github.com/ruvnet/RuVector) — ⭐ 3,906 · `Rust` · Library — RuVector is a high-performance, real-time, self-learning AI vector and Graph Neural Network (GNN) memory database built in Rust. It offers advanced data storage and retrieval capabilities with graph intelligence.
- [ashvardanian/NumKong](https://github.com/ashvardanian/NumKong) — ⭐ 1,812 · `C` · Library — NumKong is a library providing SIMD-accelerated numerical operations, including distances, dot products, and matrix operations, for various data types and architectures. - [endee-io/endee](https://github.com/endee-io/endee) — ⭐ 1,298 · `C++` · Self-hosted Service — Endee.io is a high-performance vector database designed to store and query up to a billion vectors on a single node. It achieves significant speed improvements through optimized indexing and execution, making it suitable for AI search, vector search, and image search applications.
- [weaviate/recipes](https://github.com/weaviate/recipes) — ⭐ 940 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Tutorial/Course — This repository provides end-to-end Jupyter notebooks demonstrating how to use Weaviate, a vector database. It covers various features and integrations such as retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), multimodal embeddings, generative AI, and function calling with LLM frameworks.
- [RyanCodrai/turbovec](https://github.com/RyanCodrai/turbovec) — ⭐ 588 · `Rust` · Library — This is a high-performance vector index, implemented in Rust with Python bindings, designed for efficient approximate nearest neighbor search. It leverages the TurboQuant algorithm and SIMD instructions to enable fast retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and embedding-based search.
- [gordonmurray/firnflow](https://github.com/gordonmurray/firnflow) — ⭐ 360 · `Rust` · Self-hosted Service — Firnflow is a multi-tenant vector and full-text search engine designed for high performance and cost efficiency. - [zhangfengcdt/memoir](https://github.com/zhangfengcdt/memoir) — ⭐ 182 · `Python` · Library — Memoir is a hierarchical memory system with Git-like version control for AI agents. - [rush-db/rushdb](https://github.com/rush-db/rushdb) — ⭐ 173 · `TypeScript` · Self-hosted Service — RushDB is a graph and vector database designed as a memory layer for AI agents. - [fpytloun/mnemory](https://github.com/fpytloun/mnemory) — ⭐ 152 · `Python` · Self-hosted Service — A self-hosted, secure, and feature-rich memory system for AI agents and assistants. It provides intelligent fact extraction, deduplication, and an artifact store for detailed content.
- [omermaksutii/mnemo](https://github.com/omermaksutii/mnemo) — ⭐ 49 · `TypeScript` · MCP Server — Mnemo is an MCP server that provides persistent memory for Claude Code, allowing the AI to recall past project decisions and preferences across sessions.
